metadata.source: Official API documentation from OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic
notes: Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 support 1M context with beta header
Gemini models use 65,536 max output tokens
GPT-5 family are the latest frontier models from OpenAI
Gemini 3 models support multimodal inputs (text, image, video, audio, PDF)
All specifications verified as of March 2026
Knowledge cutoffs vary by model - check official docs for details
